findings.quote: At the door, the gate refuses a defect.
findings.duplicate_of: The gate refuses a defect at the door.
findings.why: restates the immediately preceding sentence with only clause order reworded

findings.quote: You can skip the rest of this section.
findings.why: addresses the reader directly with the word 'you'

findings.quote: You can skip the rest of this section.
findings.why: invitation to skip, kin to the banned 'you can ignore'

findings.quote: Simply ignore the footnotes for now.
Simply ignore the footnotes for now.
findings.why: imperative meta-commentary addressing the reader about reading the document
